title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. sabaudum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. sabaudum, also known as the hawkweed or oxeye hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. sabaudum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
